summary: R1 target verified present & ZFC-dirty: precomplete.go has matchMindspecComplete/commandSegments/segmentInvokesComplete/strippedCompleteFields/completeBeadID/segmentCompleteBeadID plus the wrapper-stripping helpers (isEnvAssignment/isMindspecBinary/isValueFlag/cdPrefixPath/leadingCdPath) and the runPreComplete gate body — a non-executing shell tokenizer that parses the agent-writable command STRING to guess a bead ID at the PreToolUse boundary (textbook ADR-0036 violation; the in-source comments at L427-434 and L38-39 already concede it is non-authoritative and slated for deferred retirement). RETIRE is sound: the in-binary gate (internal/complete/panel_advisory.go panelGate, invoked at complete.go:281) reads the DECLARED beadID arg, runs the SAME panel.PanelGateDecision over panel.ResolveGateFacts, and returns panelGateErr BEFORE CommitAll/bd-close/merge — it genuinely blocks and covers every invocation form. Block-parity confirmed structurally: internal/complete does NOT import internal/hook (grep clean), so removing the hook matcher cannot affect the authoritative path. Nothing else consumes the hook helpers. spec-072 retired-hook removal precedent (removeStaleMindspecEntries) exists in claude.go, supporting the idempotent-removal AC. R2 target verified present & ZFC-dirty: analyzer.go:694 extractMentionedPaths scrapes paths from prose via hard-coded extension substring matching (.go/.ts/.js/.py/.yaml/.yml/.md/.json); sole consumer is PlanFidelity (L544). PlanFidelityScore is report-only (report.go:21/54/68 — emitted in JSON + printed, never gates pass/fail); confirmed no pass/fail consumer. key_file_paths/KeyFilePaths are absent from internal/harness (grep clean), so the structured-consume option is genuinely out of reach from the analyzer — RETIRE is the proportionate choice for a non-gating score. AC achievability spot-checked: dropping the path term to commands-only keeps TestAnalyzer_PlanFidelity_HighScore (go test matched -> 1.0) and _LowScore (ls vs go test -> 0.0) on the correct sides of their 0.5 thresholds, and the spec lists analyzer_test.go in scope for any needed update. ACs are concrete, grep/test-pinned, correctly filter the slow harness scenarios, and assert build-green + no-new-heuristic. No load-bearing heuristic removed; no misdescribed target; nothing already-removed. APPROVE.
